title: PM Weather Enhancements
description: Resource pack that improves and adds new sounds as well as improves visuals in Protomanly's Weather Mod
body:
This resource pack targets to improve Protomanly's Weather Mod, it adds new sounds🔊, **118** new thunder sounds⚡(**71** distant thunder, **47** close thunder) **40** new hail sounds🧊, general sound improvements for rain🌧️, wind💨, and so on! It changes rendering pipeline to make clouds and precipitation shafts wayy better! And changes particle and precipitation textures🌧️🌨️.

**!**‼️❗**AFFECTS PERFORMANCE, USUALLY AT COMPUTATIONAL NOISE LEVEL**❗‼️!


**!**‼️❗**NEEDS COMPUTATIONAL NOISE SETTING OFF**❗‼️!
